title: Weekly Source Reconciliation
summary: Compare two weekly data exports, log discrepancies, and update the reconciliation tracker.
entry_conditions: The weekly exports from both systems are available.

source_a_export.description: File path for the source A export.

source_b_export.description: File path for the source B export.

discrepancy_count.description: Number of discrepancies found during reconciliation.

tracker_status.description: Status recorded in the reconciliation tracker.

entities.name: Reconciliation Tracker
entities.description: Log that captures the result of the weekly reconciliation.

nodes.name: Load both exports
nodes.instruction: Open the weekly export files from source A and source B so their records can be compared.
completion_checks: Both exports are accessible and ready for comparison.

recovery.instructions: Retry loading the exports once and stop for review if either source file remains unavailable or unreadable.

nodes.name: Compare records
nodes.instruction: Compare the exports row by row and identify any missing, mismatched, or duplicate records.
completion_checks: Any discrepancies between the two exports have been listed.

recovery.instructions: If direct comparison is blocked by formatting differences, normalize both exports to a shared column set before continuing.

risk.reason: The comparison is read-only until the log is updated.

nodes.name: Were discrepancies found?
nodes.question: Does the comparison produce any missing, mismatched, or duplicate records?
nodes.evaluation_hint: Treat any non-zero discrepancy count as a discrepancy case.

nodes.name: Update reconciliation tracker
nodes.instruction: Record the weekly reconciliation result in the tracker, including the discrepancy count and any follow-up needed.
completion_checks: The reconciliation tracker shows the current week's status.

recovery.instructions: Pause for review if the discrepancy count cannot be reconciled with the tracker entry or the tracker is locked.

risk.reason: Tracker updates are operationally important but can be corrected.

transitions.condition: Discrepancies were found and need to be logged

provenance.observed_vs_inferred_summary: This APD was written directly by a human author and does not depend on capture-session provenance.
